name: app.anakior/atlas-mind
description: Self-hosted git-native knowledge base with an MCP endpoint your AI reads, writes and rewinds

environment_variables.name: ATLAS_MCP_URL
environment_variables.description: MCP URL of your running Atlas Mind instance, minted in Settings → Tokens in the web UI (or `atlas token create` locally), e.g. https://your-atlas/mcp/<token>
